productDisplayName: Puma Men Redon Move White Casual Shoes
description: puma's redon move casual shoes offer great speed and traction with maximum comfort and grip on turf. Simple and stylish, these shoes can be teamed with jeans and a tee for casual outings.UpperSynthetic leather upper with stitch detailing for structure, durability and protectionPadded tongue and collar with a fabric lining for enhanced comfortcat logo appliquéd on the medial side and printed on the back and tongue, and the Puma formstripe on the lateral side for enhanced durability and styleThe sleek upper with cross-upper velcro closure makes this shoe easy to get on and offMidsoleIdCELL, a low-density cushioning unit to improve shock absorption and protect the feetKMS Lite midsole that provides better cushioning and reduces weightOutsoleArchTec guides the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-offDecoupled Heel Construction to distribute impact, allowing for a softer motionduoCELL, a long-lasting CELL unit in heel for improved shock absorptionEverRide, a blown rubber outsole reducing weight and improving forefoot cushioningEverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areasM2D, a second density on the medial side to stabilize the foot during the stance phaseShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
